## 🍳 New FlutterCook recipe / demo

Thanks for contributing! Fill this in so your demo can be validated and merged fast.

### What library does this add?
- **Package / repo:** <!-- e.g. flutter_animate (pub.dev/packages/flutter_animate) -->
- **Category:** <!-- AI · ML/Vision · State · UI · Backend · DB · Dev tools · Media -->
- **Recipe number (if known):** #

### Checklist (required — the validation check enforces these)
- [ ] Demo lives in `demos/<package_name>/index.html` (one folder per package)
- [ ] The page is **self-contained** (inline CSS/JS, no external build step)
- [ ] It follows the FlutterCook dark/teal style (see `demos/flutter_gemma/`)
- [ ] Links back to the package on **pub.dev** and to the repo
- [ ] `<title>` and a `<meta name="description">` are set (SEO)
- [ ] I confirmed it renders locally (opened the `index.html` in a browser)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tokens committed

### Screenshot (optional but appreciated)
<!-- drag an image here -->

> ✅ When the **Validate PR** check passes, a maintainer merges (one click).
> Merging to `main` **auto-deploys** to https://fluttercook.github.io.
> Maintainers can also click *Enable auto-merge* on a green PR for hands-off merging.
